name: Zen Planner Fitness Studio Management API
what_it_does: Zen Planner fitness studio and membership management REST API for martial arts schools, yoga studios, CrossFit gyms, and boutique fitness businesses to manage members, class schedules, and billing. Enables AI agents to manage member enrollment and membership plan management for fitness studio member automation, handle class and appointment scheduling for fitness booking automation, access belt rank and skill level progression tracking for martial arts curriculum automation, retrieve attendance and check-in history for fitness operations automation, manage recurring billing and payment collection for studio revenue automation, handle family account and multi-member household management for youth fitness program automation, access staff scheduling and instructor management for studio operations automation, retrieve lead management and trial member conversion for fitness sales automation, manage online member portal and self-service for studio communication automation, and integrate Zen Planner with payment processors and fitness apps for boutique fitness management.
use_cases: Managing martial arts student progression from curriculum automation agents
Scheduling fitness classes from studio booking automation agents
Processing family memberships from youth program automation agents
Tracking member retention from fitness studio analytics agents
not_for: Large health club chains (use ABC Fitness or ClubReady)
Physical therapy and medical fitness management
best_when: A martial arts school, yoga studio, CrossFit gym, or boutique fitness studio wanting AI agents to automate member onboarding, class scheduling, curriculum progression tracking, and family membership billing.
avoid_when: MINOR STUDENT PARENTAL CONSENT AND WAIVER MANAGEMENT: Automated student enrollment for minors via Zen Planner must collect and store signed parental consent and liability waiver documentation; automated minor enrollment without verified parental consent creates liability for fitness and martial arts activities. CURRICULUM RANK PROGRESSION AUDIT TRAIL: Automated belt rank or level promotion via Zen Planner must maintain instructor-verified promotion audit trail; automated promotion without instructor review creates curriculum integrity issues for credentialed martial arts programs with international affiliation requirements. PAYMENT AUTO-RENEWAL STATE DISCLOSURE: Automated recurring membership billing must include state-required auto-renewal disclosures; automated enrollment in states with auto-renewal law requirements (California, New York) without disclosure creates consumer protection violation.

auth.notes: Zen Planner uses API key authentication. REST API with XML and JSON. Highlands Ranch, Colorado HQ. Founded 2006 by Todd Hirner. Acquired by Daxko in 2019. Part of Daxko portfolio of fitness management software (Daxko, Club Automation, SportsEngine, GroupEx Pro). Focused on martial arts schools, CrossFit, yoga, and boutique fitness. Member management, curriculum tracking, family accounts, and billing. Competes with Mindbody, PushPress, and Glofox for studio management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-location monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-location monthly subscription based on active member count; Daxko enterprise pricing for multi-location operators
pricing.notes: Highlands Ranch CO. Daxko subsidiary since 2019. Per-location subscription. Active member-based pricing. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; member and schedule queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required for status changes

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — ALL STATUS CHANGES REQUIRE POLLING: Zen Planner does not support webhooks; automated triggers for member enrollment, belt promotion, class registration, and payment events require scheduled polling; implement polling aligned with studio operation hours (hourly for class bookings, daily for membership changes)

XML AND JSON MIXED RESPONSE FORMATS: Zen Planner API supports both XML and JSON but response format consistency varies by endpoint version; automated data parsing must handle both XML and JSON response formats; some legacy endpoints may only return XML; test format handling for each endpoint before automated workflow deployment

DAXKO PLATFORM MIGRATION RISK: Zen Planner is a Daxko portfolio product acquired in 2019; Daxko platform consolidation may affect Zen Planner API availability and roadmap; evaluate alternative fitness management APIs (Mindbody, PushPress) for new integrations to reduce sunset risk for long-term automated workflows

FAMILY ACCOUNT BILLING AGGREGATE LOGIC: Zen Planner family accounts aggregate billing across multiple members; automated billing queries must account for family account structure to avoid per-member billing double-counting; query family account balance rather than individual member balance for accurate automated billing reconciliation

BELT RANK PROMOTION REQUIRES INSTRUCTOR CONFIRMATION: Zen Planner curriculum module supports belt rank progression; automated rank promotion API call must include instructor confirmation flag; automated promotion without instructor authorization creates curriculum integrity issue for accredited martial arts programs with promotion ceremony requirements

API KEY ROTATION DISRUPTS ACTIVE INTEGRATIONS: Zen Planner API key rotation immediately invalidates previous key; automated integrations using old API key will fail immediately on rotation without graceful transition period; coordinate API key rotation with all active automated integrations; implement API key refresh notification to minimize integration downtime
agent_readiness.security_notes: Fitness studio management. PCI-DSS. API key. US. Member personal data, payment info, and fitness attendance records.

security_score_components.security_notes: Fitness studio. PCI-DSS. API key. US. Member personal, payment, and curriculum data.
